g.text: Complete Production Architecture - SOA Compliant (Option A)
• 🟢 UI Layer: Pure presentation + PLC/Protocol address modes
• 🔵 Managers: SOA orchestration + address mode coordination + workflow logic
• ⚙️ Services: Business logic + real-time sync + address validation
Option A: Moved BulkOperationsHandler, DataRefresher to managers
Features: Dynamic address modes, real-time sync, range validation (max 499999)
🎉 FULL MIGRATION COMPLETE: RegisterTableView with integrated business logic
Architecture Cleanup: Eliminated all adapter pattern complexity
Qt-integrated logging with signal support - located at modbusx/logger.py
Enhanced with PLC/Protocol address mode selection toolbar
Enhanced with auto-adjustment, address mode selection, and conflict resolution
Loads modbusx/ui/bulk_operations.ui; falls back to manual dialog on failure
Fallback UI - programmatically created when .ui file fails
Uses same BulkOperationsHandler as main dialog
Better tree component - could replace legacy
QAbstractTableModel; virtualized rows, lazy formatting, role-based data
🎉 FULL MIGRATION COMPLETE - Enhanced with integrated business logic
Virtualized table (QAbstractTableModel) for 10k+ registers without freeze
Ensures PLC prefixes/0x prefix automatically, emits raw text via addressChanged
Uses RegisterValidator for enhanced validation with 499999 range limit
Used by MultiTypeGroupDialog for adding individual blocks
Static template definitions for common ModBus setups
Enhanced with RegisterSyncService integration for real-time updates
Centralized manager for PLC/Protocol address mode switching
Moved from UI layer - orchestrates bulk operations workflow
Moved from UI layer - manages data refresh workflow
Enhanced with auto-adjustment, conflict detection, and range validation (max 499999)
Real-time register synchronization without connection restart
Signal broadcaster for register change events
Schedules timed actions; applies via RegisterSyncService
Uses function handlers to eliminate duplicate code
Base class eliminates duplicate logic across functions
Common request structure for all protocols
Common response structure for all protocols
PyModbus bridge - converts RegisterMap to ModbusSparseDataBlock
Handles protocol address ↔ user address translation
uses for address input with locked prefixes
